projects.desc: Contributing to Kdenlive, an open-source video editor.
A recipe manager that helps you save, organize, and discover recipes from around the web, all in one place.

pastProjects.desc: A Chrome extension that fixes the typing lag and slowness you get in long Claude.ai conversations.
A Chrome extension that lets you peek into your GitHub repositories without clicking. No more scrolling through your repositories to find the one you want to work on.
Interactive CLI to list and delete stale git branches

A minimal, gamified productivity tracker where you can log tasks, hours, streaks, and points — and stay motivated by connecting with multiple friends to compare progress and build consistency together.
A friction-zero Chrome extension that lets you save tweets to Notion with a single tap. No modals, no decision fatigue—just flow.
An offline, privacy-first AI tutor that helps you learn from your study materials through intelligent summarization, Q&A, and quiz generation.
A reinforcement-learning–powered air hockey game with a launcher, offering both a casual AI mode and an extreme RL showdown.
A minimalist Linux timelapse recorder with a Bubbletea TUI and Python backend — capture time, frame by frame, the smart way.
A real-time chat app built with React, Node, and Socket.IO for local networks and hostels.
